name: Hawaiian Flours Zucchini/Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Water and juice from cans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the bread machine.
2. Combine all ingredients in the order specified by your bread machine's settings.
3. Add the corn and zucchini after the liquids have been measured.
4. Select the appropriate setting for a quick bake or similar short baking time.
5. Allow the bread to cool before serving.
